action_set_definitions.name: initialize_session
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the initial environment state including student profile, current knowledge levels, and baseline engagement/fatigue metrics.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_curriculum_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a batch of available instructional modules and assessments for specific skills. Returns metadata including activity IDs, expected mastery gain, fatigue cost, and engagement impact.

skill_keywords.description: List of skill areas (e.g., ['Python Syntax', 'Advanced Control Flow']).

action_set_definitions.name: execute_activity
action_set_definitions.description: Engages the student with the specified activity. Returns the updated environment state and an assessment score (if applicable). Use the returned state to update strategy without extra calls.

activity_id.description: The unique ID of the module or assessment to be executed.

state_description.knowledge_map: A mapping of skill IDs to mastery levels (float between 0.0 and 1.0).
state_description.engagement_level: A float (0.0 to 1.0) representing the student's current focus and motivation.
state_description.fatigue_index: A float (0.0 to 1.0) representing student exhaustion; higher values decrease performance probability.
state_description.session_history: A list of IDs for modules completed in the current session.
state_description.student_learning_pace: A constant multiplier representing the student's inherent learning speed.
